title: DataShape
description: Normalized description of the data an endpoint returns, used to match it to UI blocks.

cardinality.description: collection = array of items; object = single record; scalar = a lone value.

item_fields.description: Fields of the (item of the) response, keyed by field name.

type.description: JSON-ish type, e.g. string|number|boolean|array|object, or a union list.

hints.description: Coarse shape flags: array_of_objects, numeric_series, has_ids, key_value, ...

ref_targets.description: Foreign-key style links to other resources (from relationship edges).
